downloadCta.headline: Ready to move forward?
downloadCta.subtitle: This is what working with ZNAS looks like in practice. The full proposal is below.

summary.headline: Haven has 20 years of work behind it. This proposal is about what gets built around it next.
summary.body: You've put two decades into Haven. The digital side hasn't kept pace. Four suspended Google Business Profiles are the most visible problem — but they're not the only one. ZNAS comes in as your technology partner: we identify what's broken, propose what needs to change, and execute only after you approve. You stay in control of every decision.

howItWorks.intro: ZNAS runs this engagement as a team — you're not handed off to a single point of contact with no backup. From week one, the focus is recovering the suspended profiles and mapping whatever else is holding Haven back. Scope and pricing are set together in the alignment meeting, before anything starts.

cards.title: Month-to-month
cards.body: No long-term lock-in. Pause or end the engagement with 15 days' notice — no penalties.

cards.title: You approve every move
cards.body: ZNAS recommends; you decide. Nothing is executed without your sign-off first.

cards.title: Three phases, clear exits
cards.body: Assessment, Transformation Proposal, Execution. Each phase ends with a deliverable you review before the next one begins.

initiative.headline: The work starts before you sign.
initiative.body:
The gameplan below was drafted before this meeting. It covers exactly how ZNAS would recover your four suspended Google Business Profiles — what starts this week without needing any access from you, what we'll need your side to unblock, and the one step only you can take: a single 60-second on-camera verification that mirrors a documented reinstatement from a peer business.

Every task is assigned. Every dependency is mapped. The appeal sequence is structured so nothing wastes one of Google's limited review windows.

Have a look before our meeting so we can spend that time on your questions and any adjustments.

realEstateAgent.headline: The real estate agent is already in build.
realEstateAgent.intro: You mentioned it in our first conversation: property research and bidding takes too long. Finding listings that actually fit your criteria, running the numbers, deciding fast enough to move on a deal — it burns time Haven doesn't have to waste. ZNAS is already building the agent that handles this for you.

points.title: Live market data
points.body: A live market data integration pulls current listings, pricing, and comparable sales automatically — no manual searching required.

points.title: Trained on how you think
points.body: The agent learns your criteria: how you pick targets, how you weigh trade-offs, and what makes a property worth moving on.

points.title: Time back in your week
points.body: Research and comparison happen in seconds, not afternoons — so you spend your time on the calls and decisions only you can make.

realEstateAgent.note: The agent runs on MemQL, ZNAS's production-grade AI platform — everything built on top of it is yours.

productShowcase.headline: Haven Deals — the deal-sourcing engine we built for you
productShowcase.intro: Three stages, each building on the last: a phone that surfaces deals, a desktop workbench for offers and pipeline, and VERA — an analyst working while you sleep. Watch each stage below, then open the live demos and click through them yourself.

stages.title: Stage 1 · Radar
stages.blurb: Your fix & flip radar, on your phone. Deals find you: lock-screen alerts when a property clears your buy box, every number honest and sourced, renovation estimates you control — and a look under the hood at memQL, the engine we built ourselves.

stages.title: Stage 2 · Offers & pipeline
stages.blurb: The radar grows a desk. A full desktop workbench — map, listings, and deal detail side by side — a human-in-the-loop offer checkpoint that never sends without you, and a pipeline board that walks every deal from approved to closed. Map, listings, pipeline: one backend, always live, in memQL.

stages.title: Stage 3 · VERA
stages.blurb: Meet Vera — her full potential. Proactive offer suggestions while you sleep, overnight morning briefs, receipts behind every number, and an analyst panel on your workbench. And under all of it: memQL — ours, our own creation — where every deal and every version is remembered, and the door AI uses to reach your data stays locked until you say so.

productShowcase.fullDemoBlurb: All three stages in one build — exactly what Stage 3 delivers, kept as the single source of truth. Open it and click through the whole thing.
